The Peptide Buyer's Playbook

Read the market
before it reads you.

The independent guide that decodes peptide marketing, categories, names, red flags, and the exact questions to ask, so you decide from knowledge, not hype.

Preview the reader
Independent · Educational only · Never a protocol
The problem

The market moves faster than your understanding.

Names before knowledge

You hear BPC-157, GLP-1, GHK-Cu, retatrutide, long before anyone explains what category they belong to or what to ask.

Claims before questions

“Optimize,” “stack,” “protocol,” “cycle.” Persuasive words that create desire while skipping risk, source, and supervision.

Pressure before clarity

Guarantees, secret protocols, and “only today” offers push a decision before you've had a chance to evaluate it.

The solution

One guide. The whole market.

The Playbook doesn't sell peptides, protocols, or treatments. It gives you the map, so you walk into any clinic, ad, or consultation already knowing the right questions.

Included

15 chapters

The six market categories explained by the goal that brings you, recovery, beauty, metabolic, performance, cognition, longevity.

Included

4 checklists

The red-flag checklist, the buyer-protection checklist, the provider question list, and a consultation prep page you bring with you.

Included

17 names decoded

The names you'll actually hear in the market, each tied to its category and the questions it should raise.

Included

Interactive reader

Read it like a living book: turn pages, search instantly, listen hands-free, and download a copy to keep.

The library

Every major name, recognized, categorized, and ready to question.

What changes

Walk in prepared.

Recognize the category instantlyKnow whether something is cosmetic, supplement, compounded, prescription, or research-only, before you engage.
Spot a bad offer in secondsThe exact red flags that separate a responsible clinic from a seller in a lab coat.
Ask questions that hold upConsultation-ready lists that put you on equal footing with any provider.
Stop overpaying for confusionUnderstand stacking, cycling, and “protocols” so you're not sold three products where one was the question.
Who it's for

Written for the careful buyer.

The clinic-curious

The wellness consumer

The skeptic

You sense the hype and want the questions that hold an offer accountable.

The Peptide Buyer's Playbook is an educational publication for informational purposes only. It does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, treatment, dosing or injection instructions, or clinical protocols, and is not a recommendation to use, purchase, combine, or stop any peptide, medication, compounded product, supplement, or wellness treatment. Always consult a licensed healthcare provider before making any decision related to peptide therapy or any other treatment. Product imagery is illustrative.
